rooms.name: Entrance Gate
rooms.description: You stand before a massive stone gate. A cold wind blows from the depths below. Old runes are carved into the wall — none of them readable.

event.name: Old Guardian
event.dialogue: Turn back while you still can. This place is not for the living.

rooms.name: Torch Hall
rooms.description: A long corridor lit by flickering torches. Shadows dance across the damp stone walls. Gravel crunches underfoot.

event.name: Rusty Sword
event.description: Lying on the ground, covered in dust, but still sharp.

rooms.name: Abandoned Library
rooms.description: Shelves packed with rotting books reach to the ceiling. The air is thick with dust. Something rustled in a dark corner.

event.name: Healing Scroll
event.description: A parchment bearing a faded healing formula. It still emanates a faint magic.

rooms.name: Secret Chamber
rooms.description: A small room hidden behind a false wall. On a pedestal sits something that glimmers in the darkness.

event.name: Protection Amulet
event.description: A golden amulet set with a blue gemstone. You feel warmth when you touch it.

rooms.name: Armory
rooms.description: Weapon racks, mostly empty. Rusted shields hang on the wall bearing a coat of arms you don't recognize.

event.name: Animated Knight
event.description: The armor in the corner suddenly stirs to life. An empty helmet slowly turns toward you.

rooms.name: Well Chamber
rooms.description: A stone well stands at the center of the room. A distant splash echoes from the depths. Someone has carved a warning on the rim: 'Do not drink'.

event.name: Wandering Pilgrim
event.dialogue: I saw a treasure beyond the throne... but the guardian... I couldn't make it. Take this — you'll need it.

rooms.name: Crypt
rooms.description: Rows of stone sarcophagi stretch into the darkness. The air is ice cold. Some of the lids have been pushed aside.

event.name: Ghoul
event.description: A pale figure with glowing eyes pulls itself out of an open sarcophagus.

rooms.name: Throne Room
rooms.description: A vast hall with a towering vaulted ceiling. A moss-covered stone throne sits on a raised dais. Behind it, a heavy door.

event.name: Undead King
event.description: The figure on the throne raises its head. A crown rests on the skull, glowing with a sinister light. It rises slowly.

rooms.name: Treasure Vault
rooms.description: Gold and jewels are piled high. You have found the legendary vault. Your adventure has come to an end... or perhaps it has only just begun?
